statement: In every magma, Equation 2642 (`x = (y * ((z * w) * u)) * u`) implies Equation 695 (`x = y * (x * ((z * z) * y))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0397
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y (op (op z w) u)) u)) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op x (op (op z z) y)))
